titleStmt.title: SII 22.133: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 133. (A.R. No. 133 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME PRĀKĀRA. UḌAIYĀR ŚŌḺAKĒRAḶADĒVA—3rd YEAR.

summary.p: This registers a gift of 102 cows by Parāntakaṉ Yādavavīman alias Uttamaśōḻa-Malāḍuḍaiyār of the Bhārgava-gōtra for the daily supply of milk and ghee, and an endowment of land for the (other) requirements of the akkāraḍalai offering to the god in the day time and rice offering during the ardhayāma service, in the temple of Ūruḍaiya-Mahādēvar at Iṟaiyānaraiyūr, a brahmadēya in Pānūr-kūṟṟam a division of Malāḍu alias Jananātha vaḷanāḍu. The land seems to have been purchased before endowment, on behalf of the donor by the sabhā of the place from a private individual by name Āritaṉ Tiruvaraṅgaṉ Kēśavaṉ of Nallaraiśūr. The details of this transaction are lost as the record stops incomplete towards the end. It may be observed here that the surname (or other name) of the village Iṟiayānaraiyūr is not found in this inscription. It was evidently added in memory of prince Śoḻakēraḷa later on.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . Uṭaiyār coḻakeraḷadevarkku yāṇṭu 3vatu malāṭāna jaṉanāta vaḷanāṭṭu pāṉūṟ kūṟ
ṟattu brahmadeyam Iṟaiyānaraiyūr sabhaiyom Ivvūr Ūruṭaiya mahā devarkku malāṭu
ṭaiyār bhārgavakottirattu parāntakan Iyātavavimanāṉa Uttamacoḻa malāṭuṭaiyār vaitta A
kkāraṭalait tiruvamutukkup paḻavarici nānāḻiyum tūpparuppu nānāḻiyum pāl kuṟuṇiyum caṟka
rai patiṉpalamum neyyamutu Uḻakkaraiyum Aṭaikkāyamutu pākku nālum Ilaiyamutu pattum At
tacāmattiruvamutukku Arici nānāḻiyum porikkaṟiyamutum neyyamutu Āḻaākkum Aṭaikkāyamutu
pākku nālum Ilaiyamutu pattum Āka Ittaṉaiyilum Ippālamutukkum neyyamutukkum Uṭaiyār
Ivvuttamacoḻa m(ā)lāṭuṭaiyār vaitta pacu nūṟṟiraṇṭu nūṟṟiraṇṭil nikki niṉṟa tiruvamutu
kaḷukku nimantañ ceyta pūmi Ivvūr kiḻpiṭākai nallaraicūrkkuḷattukkiḻ kaḻaniyuḷ taṉiyāka
nilam Āritan tiruvaraṅkaṉ kecavanpakkal sabhai vilaikoṇṭu naṉceyum puṉceyum
nattamum Ittiruvaraṅkan kecavanukku Innallaraicūrkkuḷattu sapaiyoStops here.
Digital edition of SII 22.133 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
